hub.title: Deep Research
hub.subtitle: Run automated deep-dive research and receive the result as a note.
hub.empty: You have no research runs yet.

billing_path.byok_help: Calls Google with the key you registered. Google bills you directly.
billing_path.managed_help: OpenCairn calls Google with its key and deducts from your credit balance.

new_dialog.title: Start a new research
new_dialog.topic_placeholder: e.g. Korean SaaS market trends in 2026
new_dialog.project_label: Project to save the resulting note in

plan_review.heading: Review the research plan
plan_review.explainer: Check the plan and tweak it if needed. Approving kicks off the deep dive.
plan_review.feedback_placeholder: Remove this part and add that part…

progress.heading: Research in progress
progress.subhead: This can take up to about an hour. You can close this page — it keeps running.

error.invalid_byok: Your Gemini API key is invalid.
error.quota_exceeded: Your Google quota has been exceeded.
error.managed_credits_short: Managed mode requires a credit top-up.
error.managed_disabled: Managed mode is not yet available.
error.concurrent_write: A concurrent edit was detected. Please retry in a moment.

meta.label: Deep Research metadata
meta.cost_disclaimer: This is an estimate; actual billing depends on the billing path.
